title: tanacetum argyrophyllum var. polycephalum
intro: Tanacetum argyrophyllum var. polycephalum, also known as the Mountain Tansy or Alpine Tansy, is a plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Tanacetum argyrophyllum var. polycephalum include relief from digestive issues, such as bloating and cramps, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate headaches. Tanacetum argyrophyllum var. polycephalum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
